sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal geomean portfolio allocation: Trade 1 contract per $5,000 equity unit per market system. When allocating across multiple systems, scale contracts by portfolio allocation percentage. Formula: Contracts = (Equity × Allocation%) / $5,000. Example: 50% allocation = 1 contract per $5,000 notional equity for that system allocation.

source_rule_text: Trade 1 contract for every $5,000 in equity when using optimal geomean portfolio allocation across multiple market systems.
